name: Oatmeal Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl stir together Flour, Oats, Baking Powder, Cinnamon, and Salt.
2. In a small bowl stir together Eggs, Milk, Butter, and Brown Sugar.
3. Add liquids to flour/oats mix, stirring until well blended.
4. Pour batter onto preheated, lightly greased (Pam works well) waffle iron.
5. Close lid and cook to desired doneness.
6. Use a fork to remove waffle from the iron. Serve with jams, honey, yogurt, or syrup.
Recipe makes 12 4-inch waffles; recipe doubles well and cooked waffles freeze and reheat nicely.
